title: Ophiorrhiza yangchunensis
taxonomy: Ophiorrhiza yangchunensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It belongs to the genus Ophiorrhiza, which comprises several species of plants native to Asia. The plant's classification is within the family Rubiaceae, a large and diverse group of flowering plants commonly known as the coffee or madder family. Ophiorrhiza yangchunensis is likely a member of the order Gentianales, as most Rubiaceae species are classified under this order. Further classification details, such as family, genus, and species ranks, are based on the APG III system of plant classification.
uses: Ophiorrhiza yangchunensis. Information on its medicinal uses is limited, but it is said to have properties that could be beneficial for treating various health issues.
